# @zakkster/lite-headless / card

Container primitive with header / body / footer slots, optionally
**collapsible** or **dismissible**. The cornerstone of every admin
dashboard.

## Quick example

```js
import { createCard } from "@zakkster/lite-headless/card";

const card = createCard({
    collapsible: true,
    dismissible: true,
    label: "Recent orders",
    onCollapseChange: (collapsed, reason) => {},
    onDismiss: (reason) => {},
});

card.attachRoot(cardEl);
card.attachBody(bodyEl);
card.attachCollapseTrigger(headerEl);   // click anywhere in header toggles
card.attachDismissButton(xButton);
```

## Options

| Option | Default | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `collapsible` | `false` | Enable collapsible state machine |
| `dismissible` | `false` | Enable dismissible state machine |
| `collapsed` | `false` | Initial collapsed state (requires `collapsible`) |
| `dismissed` | `false` | Initial dismissed state (requires `dismissible`) |
| `label` | `null` | Sets `aria-label` + `role="region"` (only if root has neither pre-set) |
| `onCollapseChange` | - | `(collapsed: boolean, reason: string) => void` |
| `onDismiss` | - | `(reason: string) => void` |

## API

```ts
{
    isCollapsed(): boolean
    isDismissed(): boolean
    collapsible: boolean    // readonly
    dismissible: boolean    // readonly

    setCollapsed(b: boolean, reason?: string): void
    toggle(reason?: string): void
    dismiss(reason?: string): void
    reopen(): void

    attachRoot(el): off
    attachBody(el): off
    attachCollapseTrigger(el): off
    attachDismissButton(el): off

    destroy(): void
}
```

## Painted attributes

### Root (`[data-card-root]`)

- `role="region"` + `aria-label="<label>"` — when `label` provided
- `data-open` — boolean, while collapsed (Class-2 boolean CSS hook)
- `data-hidden` — boolean, while dismissed
- `hidden` — when dismissed (for SR + non-CSS contexts)

### Body (`[data-card-body]`)

- `id` — auto-generated for `aria-controls` linkage (when collapsible)
- `hidden` — when collapsed

### Collapse trigger

- `aria-expanded="true|false"` — flipped on toggle
- `aria-controls=<body-id>` — wires to the body for SR navigation

### Dismiss button (`[data-card-dismiss]`)

- `aria-label="Dismiss"` — only if not pre-set

## Wrapper (`<lite-card>`)

```html
<lite-card collapsible dismissible label="Sales Q3">
    <div data-card-header>
        Sales Q3
        <button data-card-collapse-trigger aria-label="Toggle">−</button>
        <button data-card-dismiss>×</button>
    </div>
    <div data-card-body>
        ...content...
    </div>
    <div data-card-footer>
        <button>View all</button>
    </div>
</lite-card>
```

Attributes:
- `collapsible` — boolean; enables the state machine
- `dismissible` — boolean
- `collapsed` — boolean; reactive (host attribute mirrors internal state)
- `dismissed` — boolean
- `label` — sets `aria-label`

Slots (auto-discovered):
- `[data-card-header]` — visual header. If `collapsible` and no explicit
  `[data-card-collapse-trigger]`, the header itself becomes the toggle.
- `[data-card-body]` — content
- `[data-card-footer]` — actions area
- `[data-card-collapse-trigger]` — explicit toggle (optional; falls back to header)
- `[data-card-dismiss]` — dismiss button

Host methods: `toggle()`, `collapse()`, `expand()`, `dismiss()`, `reopen()`.
Host accessors: `isCollapsed`, `isDismissed`, `_cardInstance`.

Events:
- `collapsechange` — `{ detail: { collapsed, reason } }`
- `dismiss` — `{ detail: { reason } }`

## CSS contract

`data-open` and `data-hidden` are Class-2 booleans. The body's
`hidden` attribute handles content visibility natively; CSS hooks
(`data-card-root[data-open]`) let you style the chrome (chevron
rotation, etc.).

## Composition

Card composes naturally with other primitives:

```html
<lite-card collapsible>
    <div data-card-header>
        <lite-avatar name="Alice" class="av-sm"><img data-avatar-img><span data-avatar-fallback></span></lite-avatar>
        Recent activity
        <button data-card-collapse-trigger>−</button>
    </div>
    <div data-card-body>
        <lite-timeline>...</lite-timeline>
    </div>
</lite-card>
```
